purpose: Analyze AndroidManifest.xml content and report package metadata, activities, services, receivers, providers, permissions, and exported component risks.

endpoints.description: Analyze Android manifest XML supplied directly in the request.

dependencies.purpose: Parse AndroidManifest.xml into a structured object without Android SDK dependencies

sidecar_specification.purpose: Android manifest metadata and exported component analyzer.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use when reviewing Android apps, CI outputs, decompiled APK manifests, or mobile permission exposure.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use for bytecode analysis, APK signing verification, runtime permission prompts, or iOS application metadata.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Extract AndroidManifest.xml text from source or APK tooling. 2) Submit manifest_xml. 3) Review permissions, components, and exported component findings.

failure_modes.condition: Android namespace attributes are missing or renamed
failure_modes.symptom: Some component names or exported flags are absent
failure_modes.recovery: Ensure manifest XML preserves android:name and android:exported attributes

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls
Must not execute Android build tools or APK installers

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Use fast-xml-parser with ignoreAttributes false and attributeNamePrefix ''. Read manifest.package, uses-permission entries, and application activity/service/receiver/provider arrays. Normalize single objects to arrays before iteration.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Android manifests may use android:name attributes and shorthand component names beginning with dot. android:exported defaults changed by Android version and should be reported as unknown unless explicit.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Parse XML only, normalize manifest structures, and generate findings for explicitly exported components lacking a permission.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not shell out to aapt, adb, gradle, or apktool in this module.
